text: I saw some features mentioned that I can't find, can you help me with that?

I tried to change my email address, but when I went to the settings, it said my current email was invalid, which doesn't make sense because I'm receiving notifications there. How can I fix this without losing any info? I need it sorted out, thanks!
the app keeps crashing when I try to sync my files, like, is this normal? I barely get any error msg.

I've been trying to log into my account, but it just keeps telling me that my credentials are incorrect, even though I know I've entered them right. It's quite unusual since I've logged in successfully just last week. Can you help me figure out what's going on?
Could you please inform me if there are any discounts available specifically for students? Additionally, how might one go about applying for such discounts?
I'm really not sure why I received an email saying my account was suspended when I just logged in without any issues. This has been quite confusing.
I would like to formally request a refund for the item I purchased last month, as it is defective and not functioning as advertised. Please advise on the steps I need to take for this process.
I really miss my favorite feature and just want to know if it's coming back or if I should look for something else.
I thought I had a subscription, but my account says it’s inactive. Can you clarify if I’m still paying?

So, I was trying to reset my password after receiving an email that said my account had suspicious activity, and then the website just kept loading, like forever. It was super weird because I was also watching a cat video, and I thought maybe it was my internet or the video causing a hiccup. Can you help? I need to get back in ASAP!
I’d like to get my money back for that shirt I bought. It doesn’t fit right.

I been tryin to access my dashboard but it keeps givin me an error message that says somethin like 'access denied' or maybe it's wrong password? not sure if I messed up or what but it’s so frustraiting. any ideas on how to fix this?

So, like, I was trying to figure out which plan I should go for, right? But the descriptions kinda left me more confused than before. Can you, um, help me understand if there's a way to, you know, switch between billing cycles? Like, if I pick one option and realize it doesn't work for me later, what happens? Just thought I’d ask but maybe it's a weird question?
I thought I canceled my subscription last month but I still got charged! Can I get a refund? This is so confusing.
so, I thought I had the premium plan, but it says I'm on basic? can you check?
I only received one of the two items I ordered, but I'm not sure if I even ordered two. Can I still get a refund for the missing one?
